creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text:
given these indicators from the headers
 
 Content analysis details:   (9.5 points, 5.0 required)
 
  pts rule name              description
 ---- ---------------------- --------------------------------------------------
  1.5 RCVD_IN_CBL            RBL: Received via a relay in cbl.abuseat.org
 [Error: open resolver; <https://check.spamhaus.org/returnc/pub/172.69.156.83/>]
  1.0 RCVD_IN_WSFF           RBL: Received via a relay in will-spam-for-food.eu.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [will-spam-for-food.eu.org]
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in will-spam-for-food.eu.org]
  1.5 RCVD_IN_SBL_XBL        RBL: Received via a relay in Spamhaus SBL+XBL
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in sbl-xbl.spamhaus.org]
  1.5 RCVD_IN_AHBL           RBL: AHBL: sender is listed in dnsbl.ahbl.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [dnsbl.ahbl.org]
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in dnsbl.ahbl.org]
  0.5 RCVD_IN_AHBL_PROXY     RBL: AHBL: Open Proxy server in dnsbl.ahbl.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [dnsbl.ahbl.org]
  0.5 RCVD_IN_AHBL_SMTP      RBL: AHBL: Open SMTP relay in dnsbl.ahbl.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [dnsbl.ahbl.org]
  1.5 RCVD_IN_AHBL_SPAM      RBL: AHBL: Spam Source in dnsbl.ahbl.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [dnsbl.ahbl.org]
  0.0 RCVD_IN_AHBL_RTB       RBL: AHBL: Real-Time Blocked in dnsbl.ahbl.org
                             [2610:1c1:1:606c:0:0:50:1d listed in]
                             [dnsbl.ahbl.org]
  0.0 RCVD_IN_ZEN_BLOCKED_OPENDNS RBL: ADMINISTRATOR NOTICE: The query to
                             zen.spamhaus.org was blocked due to usage of an
                              open resolver. See
                             https://www.spamhaus.org/returnc/pub/
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in zen.spamhaus.org]
  0.0 URIBL_DBL_BLOCKED_OPENDNS ADMINISTRATOR NOTICE: The query to
                             dbl.spamhaus.org was blocked due to usage of an
                              open resolver. See
                             https://www.spamhaus.org/returnc/pub/
                             [URI: spamhaus.org]
 -0.2 RCVD_IN_MSPIKE_H2      RBL: Average reputation (+2)
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in wl.mailspike.net]
  0.0 RCVD_IN_DNSWL_BLOCKED  RBL: ADMINISTRATOR NOTICE: The query to DNSWL
                             was blocked.  See
                             http://wiki.apache.org/spamassassin/DnsBlocklists#dnsbl-block
                              for more information.
                             [96.47.72.81 listed in list.dnswl.org]
  0.1 URIBL_SBL_A            Contains URL's A record listed in the SBL blocklist
                             [URI: spamhaus.org/3.126.246.180]
                             [URI: hideyoshi.spamhaus.net/162.159.24.35]
                             [URI: musashi.spamhaus.org/162.159.25.27]
 -0.0 SPF_PASS               SPF: sender matches SPF record
  0.0 ARC_VALID              Message has a valid ARC signature
  0.0 ARC_SIGNED             Message has a ARC signature
  0.2 MR_NOT_ATTRIBUTED_IP   Beta rule: an non-attributed IPv4 found in
                             headers
 -0.0 T_RP_MATCHES_RCVD      Envelope sender domain matches handover relay
                             domain
  0.6 J_CHICKENPOX_63        BODY: 6alpha-pock-3alpha
  0.0 SARE_FROM_SPAM_WORD4   From address suggests this may be spam
  0.8 SARE_FROM_SPAM_WORD3   I don't know people named this!
  0.0 NO_RDNS2               Sending MTA has no reverse DNS
Subject: {SPAM?}  [Bug 282320] mailing lists lists as spam source from spamhaus.org

I would investigate how we got to this state
